---
name: Epic
about: A large body of work spanning multiple features and sprints
title: "epic: "
labels: [type:epic]
assignees: []
---

## Epic Summary
<!-- High-level description of this epic and the business value it delivers -->

## Sprint Allocation
<!-- Which sprints does this epic span? -->
- **Sprint N (dates):** Scope summary
- **Sprint N+1 (dates):** Scope summary

## Child Features
<!-- Link all feature issues that belong to this epic -->
- [ ] #__ — Feature title (Sprint N)
- [ ] #__ — Feature title (Sprint N+1)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All child features completed and merged
- [ ] Integration tested end-to-end
- [ ] Production build succeeds
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Technical Notes
<!-- Architecture decisions, constraints, dependencies across features -->

## Definition of Done
- [ ] All child issues closed
- [ ] Release branch created and tested
- [ ] Milestone checklist updated
